data_description.account_name: Et vennlig navn for denne AWS-kontoen
data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: Hvor ofte AWS API-er skal spørres (5-60 minutter)
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Aktiverer historikkdiagrammer for ressurstelling (bruker flere sensorer)

regions.title: Velg AWS-regioner
regions.description: Velg hvilke regioner som skal overvåkes

services.title: Select Services to Monitor
services.description: Choose which AWS services to monitor. Only enable services you actually use. The next step will show the minimum IAM policy needed for your selection.

iam_policy.title: IAM Policy
iam_policy.description:
Apply this minimum IAM policy to your AWS user before clicking Finish.

```json
{policy}
```

Policy covers {service_count} service(s).

error.connection: Kan ikke koble til AWS. Sjekk internettforbindelsen din.

data_description.refresh_interval: Hvor ofte AWS skal sjekkes for ressursoppdateringer (1-60 minutter)
data_description.cost_refresh_interval: Hvor ofte AWS Cost Explorer skal sjekkes (60-1440 minutter). Kostnadsdata oppdateres en gang daglig, å sjekke oftere kaster bort penger ($0,01 per API-kall).
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Opprett separate tellersensorer for hver ressurstype (EC2, RDS, Lambda, osv.)
data_description.skip_initial_refresh: Ikke vent på data ved oppstart - hent ved første planlagte oppdatering

select_services.title: Select Services to Monitor
select_services.description: Choose which AWS services to monitor. Removing a service will delete its sensors. Adding a service may require updating your IAM policy.

iam_additions.title: IAM Policy Update Required
iam_additions.description:
You have added services that require new IAM permissions. Add the following actions to your IAM policy before saving:

```
{actions}
```

refresh_account.name: Oppdater konto
refresh_account.description: Oppdater manuelt alle AWS-data for en konto

account_name.name: Kontonavn
account_name.description: Navnet på AWS-kontoen som skal oppdateres
